name: RISMA SYSTEMS A/S
summary: RISMA SYSTEMS A/S provides software-as-a-service (SaaS) solutions for governance, risk, and compliance (GRC) management. The company's platform helps organizations manage their GRC processes, including risk assessments, compliance reporting, and internal audits, headquartered in Copenhagen, Denmark. RISMA SYSTEMS focuses on simplifying and automating GRC activities for its clients.
